profile:
I am a Senior Product Manager looking for high-growth tech opportunities.

CRITERIA & WEIGHTS:
1. Compensation (20%): Look for high salary ranges ($160k+).
2. Product Fit (20%): BOOSTS: UX, CX, AI PM workflows. PENALTIES: Backend engineering, data architecture.
3. Remote Flexibility (15%): Score 100 for fully remote.
4. AI Maturity (10%): Score high if building AI products.
5. Leadership (10%): Score high if there is opportunity for team leadership.
6. Growth (10%): Score high if it's a fast-growing company.
7. Culture (10%): Score based on indications of a strong culture.
8. Tech Stack (5%): Score high if using modern tech.
